jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Resonance - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Resonance. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Teacher to strengthen our Raipur-based team.

About Resonance:
Resonance is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Support students with special educational needs
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Learning & development budget
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Life and accident insurance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Resonance!
